name: Wine Quality
description: Physicochemical and sensory quality data for red and white variants of the Portuguese 'Vinho Verde' wine. The dataset contains 1,599 red wine samples and 4,898 white wine samples collected from May 2004 to February 2007 by the Viticulture Commission of the Vinho Verde Region (CVRVV). Each instance records 11 physicochemical input variables (fixed acidity, volatile acidity, citric acid, residual sugar, chlorides, free sulfur dioxide, total sulfur dioxide, density, pH, sulphates, and alcohol) and one sensory quality score (0–10) based on the median rating of at least three certified wine experts. Widely used for regression and classification benchmarking.

affiliation.name: Viticulture Commission of the Vinho Verde Region (CVRVV)

spatialCoverage.name: Vinho Verde Region, Minho, Northwest Portugal

measurementTechnique: Physicochemical laboratory testing using OIV (International Organisation of Vine and Wine) standard methods
Blind sensory evaluation by a minimum of three certified sommeliers on a 0–10 integer quality scale
Median aggregation of expert sensory scores
